input.background: Consider these eight data points: 1.47, 2.06, 2.36, 3.43, 3.74, 3.78, 3.94, 4.42. Data have three significant digits although only two are needed for plotting. Our rule will be to analyze the shape, location, and spread of the data.
input.question: What is the shape of the data distribution?

output.answer: A mound shape with no apparent outliers. (With such a small data set, little else can be said about shape.)
